subcodes.title: Words to Miss Fraser, spoken on 1913-03-29
subcodes.first_line: Yes! But His sadness did not come from anything belonging to Himself. He desired to make a man illumined, but man preferred darkness
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
